calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-015 handcrafted goal cue diagnostic -- oracle vs absent (re-queue: 182 ID collision)
items.notes: EXP-0091. Re-queue: 182 ran as terrain_calibration (wrong script), not the SD-015 goal diagnostic. Script unchanged from 182. Critical diagnostic: if E3 cannot exploit a perfect oracle goal signal, selection mechanism is broken.

items.title: MECH-153 validation: supervised context-labeling for E1 ContextMemory (fix: populate memory)
items.notes: MECH-153 validation. Fix: 187 never called context_memory.write() -- memory slots stayed at randn*0.01, making attention output constant. 187a adds write() calls during Phase 0 training. PASS if cosine_sim < 0.85 + terrain_weight accuracy > 70% + harm_r2 > 0.3.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: SD-011 dual nociceptive stream stability test
items.notes: EXP-0090. SD-011 stability replication. DUAL_STREAM vs FUSED_STREAM. 2 seeds, 150+80+40 episodes x 200 steps. 6 criteria.

items.title: ARC-030 benefit_eval_head with phased training (resource proximity)
items.notes: Re-run of EXQ-180 with phased training. EXQ-180 showed probe_r2=0.619 (z_world encodes resource proximity) but benefit_ratio=0.29x (head trained jointly couldn't exploit it). Fix: P0 E1+E2 warmup (200 eps), P1 freeze encoder + train head on detached z_world (100 eps), P2 eval with benefit_eval in E3 (200 eps). 3 seeds, resource_field_view.max() labels.
